title: Power of Creation
description: Engineering, Blacksmithing, Hexcraft, Composing, Cooking, Painting, Photography, Architecture. A pack for creativity
body:
### A modpack focusing on giving players the power to create anything
- **Alex's Mobs** beings new life (and death) into the world
- **Create** is joined by **Steam 'n' Rails**, **Enchantment Industry**, and **Ore Vents**, allowing for just about anything to be automated
- **Farmer's Delight** and **Slice & Dice** let you cook up and automate fresh dishes and drinks with new ingredients
- **Hexcasting** and **Hexical** let you design your own hexes to manipulate the world around you
- **Tetra** and **Tetracelium** are gateways to handcrafted weapons, tools, toolbelts, bows and shields that are worth the time spent honing them
- **Quark**, **Supplementaries** and **Amendments** bring countless tweaks and additions that are all awesome
- **Aleki's Nifty Ships** let you construct and decorate your own vessel to sail the world
- **Continents** and **Geophilic** shape the world into one worth exploring (and sailing!)
- **Figura** lets players appear as custom avatars with custom animations and features
